human_actions_pending.action: Verify pop-up modals are centered on both pages after latest fix
human_actions_pending.context: User confirmed pop-ups appeared top-left; fix applied (x-if instead of x-show). Needs browser confirmation.

decisions.decision: Modal pop-ups use x-if (not x-show) for overlay divs with display:flex
decisions.rationale: x-show removes display:flex when toggling; x-if adds/removes element entirely preserving inline styles

decisions.decision: Mobile drawer and backdrop are siblings of nav (not children)
decisions.rationale: nav has backdrop-filter which in Chrome/WebKit creates containing block for fixed descendants, clipping drawer to nav height

decisions.decision: Nav always shows frosted-beige background (bg-beige/92 backdrop-blur)
decisions.rationale: Transparent nav made charcoal links invisible over dark hero backgrounds
